title: coleus scutellarioides var. blumei
intro: Coleus scutellarioides var. blumei, also known as Coleus blumei, is a type of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the coleus. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and supporting digestion, due to its active compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. In herbal preparations, Coleus blumei is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
